history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young person with dark, curly hair sits alone on a wooden chair, facing away from the camera and towards a wall. They are wearing a black t-shirt with a graphic design and loose white pants. Their head is bowed, and one hand is brought to their face, suggesting contemplation or shyness. A ring is visible on their left hand.

Beside them, on a rustic wooden table, are two clear plastic cups with drinks, one appearing to be a light-colored beverage and the other a darker, possibly chocolate-based drink. In front of the cups is a small, peach-colored bowl containing a light-colored food, possibly a salad or dessert, with a small orange condiment or garnish on top.

The background features a textured, light-colored wall on the left, with a white electrical outlet and cord visible. To the right, a decorative partition made of vertical wooden slats and glass panels creates a sense of separation and depth, hinting at another space beyond. The lighting is soft and ambient, casting gentle shadows and creating a somewhat moody atmosphere. The overall color palette is muted, dominated by earthy tones of wood, beige walls, and the black and white of the person's attire, with pops of color from the drinks and the bowl. The mood is quiet, introspective, and a little melancholic. The style is casual and contemporary.
